entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop studied for yield reduction due to soil erosion in the Sahel region.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The measure of productivity for pearl millet affected by topsoil loss and fertilization.

entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: The process of soil degradation leading to topsoil loss in the Sahel.

entities.name: SOIL DEGRADATION
entities.description: The broader process of soil quality decline, of which soil erosion is a major contributor.

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: The semi-arid region where soil erosion and pearl millet productivity were studied.

entities.name: TOPSOIL LOSS
entities.description: The removal of the upper layer of soil, which negatively impacts crop productivity.

entities.name: SIMULATED EROSION
entities.description: The experimental technique of removing specific depths of topsoil to study its effects.

entities.name: ARENOSOL
entities.description: The specific type of sandy soil on which the field experiments were conducted.

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: The country in the Sahel where the field experiments took place.

entities.name: FERTILIZATION
entities.description: The application of fertilizers to mitigate the loss of grain yield caused by topsoil removal.

entities.name: RAINFALL CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental moisture levels that influence the impact of topsoil removal on yield.

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The broader geographic region mentioned in comparison to the Sahel's yield reduction values.

entities.name: AP HORIZON
entities.description: The thin surface soil layer whose loss reduces water and nutrient availability.

entities.name: PLANT-AVAILABLE WATER
entities.description: The amount of water in the soil accessible to plants, reduced by the loss of the Ap horizon.

entities.name: NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential soil elements reduced by the loss of the Ap horizon, leading to decreased yield.
